ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blower_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "blower_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blower model */,
  "orifice_size_in" REAL /* Size of the orifice in inches */,
  "current_a" REAL /* Current in amperes */,
  "input_power_w" REAL /* Input power in watts */,
  "speed_rpm" INTEGER /* Speed in revolutions per minute */,
  "vacuum_in_h2o" REAL /* Vacuum in inches of water */,
  "air_flow_cfm" REAL /* Air flow in cubic feet per minute */,
  "air_power_w" REAL /* Air power in watts */,
  "efficiency_percent" REAL /* Efficiency percentage */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance test */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific performance test */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  "test_equipment_used" TEXT /* List of equipment used during the test */,
  "test_temperature_c" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "test_humidity_percent" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "test_pressure_in_h2o" REAL /* Pressure in inches of water */,
  "test_duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in minutes */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blower_performance_blower_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("blower_model_id") REFERENCES blower_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blower_performance_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blower_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blower model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the blower model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the blower model */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date the model started production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date the model ended production */,
  "model_specification_file" TEXT /* Path to the specification file for the model */,
  "model_compliance_standards" TEXT /* List of industry standards the model complies with */,
  "model_designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer of the model */,
  "model_production_line" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blower_models_model_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_designer_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blower_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blower configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blower model */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "orifice_size_in" REAL /* Default size of the orifice in inches */,
  "speed_rpm" INTEGER /* Default speed in revolutions per minute */,
  "default_current_a" REAL /* Default current in amperes */,
  "default_input_power_w" REAL /* Default input power in watts */,
  "default_vacuum_in_h2o" REAL /* Default vacuum in inches of water */,
  "default_air_flow_cfm" REAL /* Default air flow in cubic feet per minute */,
  "default_air_power_w" REAL /* Default air power in watts */,
  "default_efficiency_percent" REAL /* Default efficiency percentage */,
  "config_specification_file" TEXT /* Path to the specification file for the configuration */,
  "config_compliance_standards" TEXT /* List of industry standards the configuration complies with */,
  "config_designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer of the configuration */,
  "config_production_line" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blower_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES blower_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blower_configurations_config_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_designer_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test environment */,
  "test_setup_description" TEXT /* Description of the test setup */,
  "environment_specification_file" TEXT /* Path to the specification file for the test environment */,
  "environment_compliance_standards" TEXT /* List of industry standards the environment complies with */,
  "environment_setup_cost" REAL /* Cost of setting up the environment */,
  "environment_maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost for the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blower configuration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test environment */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator conducting the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations during the test */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the test data */,
  "test_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test data was last modified */,
  "test_last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES blower_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("test_last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., engineer, technician, supervisor) */,
  "operator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "operator_department" TEXT /* Department of the operator */,
  "operator_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operators_operator_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_supervisor_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metric data */,
  "metric_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric data was last modified */,
  "metric_last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("metric_last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES blower_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_supervisor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
